nasb.text: The Lord has spoken to you, O remnant of Judah, “Do not go into Egypt!” You should clearly understand that today I have testified against you.

esv.text: The Lord has said to you, O remnant of Judah, ‘Do not go to Egypt.’ Know for a certainty that I have warned you this day

cnv.text: 猶大餘剩的人哪，耶和華曾對你們說：‘你們不要去埃及。’你們要確實知道，我今天已經警告你們了。

ccb.text: 犹大的余民啊，耶和华已告诉你们不要去埃及。别忘了我今日给你们的警告，
